task_description: Make the Minecraft LAN Tunnel program work without port forwarding by adding public relay server support: deployment configs (Dockerfile, render.yaml, fly.toml), relay mode selection in the desktop app Settings (Public/Local/Custom), and one-click deploy instructions in README.

verification.summary: npm run build compiles all 4 workspaces cleanly. All 21 tests pass. Docker multi-stage build succeeds. Semantic review v2 approved.
